name: edwson-design-system-components
note: Each component is a CONTRACT, not just markup. The metadata (whenToUse / whenNot / props / a11y / regulatory / dataContract) is what lets an AI agent pick and wire the right component on the first try — which is where the token savings come from (fewer correction loops, no value regeneration).

OrderTicket.purpose: Place a buy/sell order with pre-trade margin + compliance checks.
OrderTicket.whenToUse: Any execution surface where a user submits an order.
OrderTicket.whenNot: Read-only blotters or historical fills — use TradeBlotter.
OrderTicket.a11y: Keyboard-first; SEND is reversible with a visible cancel window; FIX OrdStatus drives state, not animation.

RiskWarning.purpose: Mandatory, non-removable risk disclosure before a high-risk action.
RiskWarning.whenToUse: Any leveraged/CFD order entry or product page that triggers a disclosure rule.
RiskWarning.whenNot: Never optional. Cannot be visually suppressed or collapsed below the fold.

PriceTicker.purpose: Live price with direction + tick animation.
PriceTicker.whenToUse: Any surface showing a streaming instrument price.
PriceTicker.whenNot: Static end-of-day reports — use a plain figure.

KycStepper.purpose: Progressive multi-step KYC/AML onboarding with save-and-resume.
KycStepper.whenNot: Single-field edits — use a standard form.
KycStepper.a11y: One section at a time; clear progress; plain-language labels.

RegCitation.purpose: Inline legal basis shown beside an intrusive question.
RegCitation.whenNot: Decorative copy. Must reference a real rule.

AiSuggestion.purpose: An AI recommendation that requires explicit human sign-off.
AiSuggestion.whenToUse: Any AI-proposed action affecting a client portfolio/account.
AiSuggestion.whenNot: Never auto-executes. Always pairs with SignOffBar.
AiSuggestion.a11y: Confidence shown numerically + as a meter; reasoning attached.

SignOffBar.purpose: Typed human sign-off that gates execution and writes an audit record.
SignOffBar.whenToUse: Commit points for AI-assisted or high-impact actions.
SignOffBar.whenNot: Low-stakes UI. Do not stub the audit write.

ConfidenceMeter.purpose: Calibrated confidence display with a designed-abstain state.
ConfidenceMeter.whenNot: Don't fake precision; show abstain when low.
ConfidenceMeter.a11y: Numeric + visual; abstain is a first-class state.

AutonomyTier.purpose: Select an AI autonomy level (Ambient → Co-pilot → Assertive → Autonomous); raising a tier requires explicit re-consent.
AutonomyTier.whenToUse: Anywhere an agent can act with varying independence and the user must own the boundary.
AutonomyTier.whenNot: Never default to the highest tier; never let a tier change without an explicit, logged user action.
AutonomyTier.a11y: Radiogroup semantics; the active tier is announced; tier names carry meaning, not colour alone.

TokenCostMeter.purpose: Estimate the AI-token cost of a call (input/output tokens × model price) including prompt-cache savings.
TokenCostMeter.whenToUse: Surfacing the cost of an AI action before or while it runs, or budgeting an agent workflow.
TokenCostMeter.whenNot: Never present an estimate as a billed amount; always label it as an estimate.
TokenCostMeter.a11y: A live region announces the total; figures use tabular numerals to avoid reflow.

dataContract.shape: { inputTokens, outputTokens, priceIn, priceOut, total, perThousand }

SchemaContract.purpose: Define a table's columns (name/type/nullable) and emit a live CREATE TABLE DDL — the data contract engineering ships.
SchemaContract.whenToUse: Authoring a schema-on-write table or data contract collaboratively before a single row is written.
SchemaContract.whenNot: Not for schema-on-read exploratory CSVs; use type inference there.
SchemaContract.a11y: Each column is a labelled fieldset; type is a native select; remove buttons carry aria-labels.
regulatory: GDPR (data minimisation via typed / NOT NULL constraints)

LineageGraph.purpose: Source → transform → table provenance as a clickable DAG with upstream/downstream impact tracing.
LineageGraph.whenToUse: Impact analysis before a schema change, or root-cause when a downstream report goes stale.
LineageGraph.whenNot: For hundreds of nodes use a dedicated lineage catalog; this is a focused single-pipeline view.
LineageGraph.a11y: Nodes are buttons, keyboard-activatable; relationship encoded in the node border, not colour alone; selection announced.

ClusterTopology.purpose: Pooled unified-memory AI cluster topology with a human visual and a machine-readable manifest (EXO-style).
ClusterTopology.whenToUse: Planning or showing an on-prem distributed-inference cluster and which model fits in pooled memory.
ClusterTopology.whenNot: Never equate pooled unified memory with single-GPU VRAM; always label memory figures as estimates.
ClusterTopology.a11y: Node cards are labelled; the pooled total sits in a live region; the manifest is a labelled code region.

AuditTrail.purpose: Append-only, hash-chained event log for compliance evidence (sign-offs, overrides, disclosures shown).
AuditTrail.whenToUse: Any action that must be defensible later: human sign-off, AI override, KYC step, disclosure acknowledgement.
AuditTrail.whenNot: Never allow edit or delete of past entries; never omit the actor or the timestamp.
AuditTrail.a11y: The log is a labelled list; new entries are announced politely; timestamps are machine-readable.
